name: Arcelyn

abilities.name: Stellar Veil
abilities.description: Envelops Arcelyn in a shimmering shield that absorbs a portion of incoming damage for 2 turns.

abilities.name: Comet's Grace
abilities.description: Calls down a brief burst of celestial energy that increases Arcelyn's agility and grants a chance to strike twice on the next attack.

bio: Arcelyn walks the space between fading stars, reading destinies written in cosmic dust. Once a scholar of forgotten nebulae, she now guides lost travelers with gentle foresight and meteor-lit signs.
